title: Aerospike Joins HPE Complete Program, Expands Partnership
text: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., June 27, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) — Aerospike, Inc., the real-time data platform leader, has been selected for the HPE Complete program from Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), bringing them into a select group of leading data-centric technology partners that complement the HPE portfolio. The move expands Aerospike’s partnership with HPE and allows customers […]...

title: AMD Strengthens HPE's Storage Solutions With EPYC Processors
text: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) expands collaboration with Hewlett Packard, bolstering latter's storage performance and capacity. This reflects strong product portfolio and growth prospects.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise AI pipeline up to $3B on recent solid wins
text: Analysts at UBS have repeated their ‘Neutral' rating for Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) after the company announced its entrance to the public AI cloud market through a new partnership with German start-up Aleph Alpha. They also repeated their 12-month price target of $15, which is below the stock's current price of $16.88.

title: Hewlett Packard (HPE) Expands Alliance With Amazon Web Services
text: Hewlett Packard (HPE) stretches its existing collaboration with Amazon Web Services to provide advanced hybrid cloud experiences to enterprise customers.

title: AI has given a big boost to stock of this lesser-known Silicon Valley computer maker
text: Right off one of the main freeways in Silicon Valley is a cluster of non-descript, off-white buildings, some hidden by trees, with the name SuperMicro on the front.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise: A Possible Bargain In The Tech Sector
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise appears to be undervalued according to price multiples, making it a good investment opportunity. The company's focus on hybrid IT solutions, Intelligent Edge, and high-performance computing differentiates it from competitors and positions it among the leaders in the sector. The company's last quarter's results proved that its business is still healthy and aggressive, posing to be a great option in the medium and long run.

title: 11:11 Systems Named Global Service Provider of the Year by HPE
text: FAIRFIELD, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--11:11 Systems (“11:11”), a managed infrastructure solutions provider, has been named Global Service Provider of the Year by Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE). The HPE Partner of the Year Award recognizes HPE partners who exemplify commitment and success in delivering value to their customers on their digital transformation journey. This recognition has been given to HPE partners who have achieved exceptional results in financial performance, innovative solutions.

title: IR Empowers HPE NonStop Customers with Business Insight
text: This add-on feature enables data access to teams beyond the core NonStop team in large enterprises. SYDNEY , June 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- IR (ASX:IRI), a leading provider of global performance management and analytics for Unified Communications and Collaboration (UC&C), IT infrastructure and payment ecosystems has launched the NonStop Business Insight product for IR Infrastructure.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Names Experienced Networking and Cybersecurity Technologist Bethany Mayer to Board of Directors
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) names experienced networking and cybersecurity technologist Bethany Mayer to its Board of Directors.

title: HPE Appoints Rom Kosla Chief Information Officer
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that Rom Kosla has been appointed Chief Information Officer (CIO). “The performance and agility of our IT team is critical to ensuring our customers and partners have great experiences doing business with us, and that our team members are able to innovate at the speed of business,” said Executive Vice President and Chief Operating and Legal Officer John Schultz. “Over the last several years, HPE has taken on massiv.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Releases 2022 Living Progress Report
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today released its annual Living Progress Report for fiscal year 2022, exhibiting the company's business strategy and commitment for creating sustainable and responsible technology solutions for a data-first world. title: Hewlett Packard's (HPE) New Dashboard to Cut IT Carbon Footprint
text: Hewlett Packard (HPE) to help organizations reduce the carbon footprint within its IT estates with a sustainability dashboard on its GreenLake platform and a comprehensive portfolio of new services.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Helps Organizations Reduce IT Carbon Footprint With New Sustainability Dashboard and Comprehensive Portfolio of Services
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced the preview of a new sustainability dashboard on the HPE GreenLake edge-to-cloud platform and a comprehensive portfolio of sustainability services. The offerings, which span technology, services, financing, and asset upcycling programs, are designed to help organizations reduce the carbon footprint associated with their IT estates. “Achieving sustainability targets in a hybrid IT environment can be complex and daun.

title: Too much debt coming due and not much cash on hand: These 10 companies face a rough year ahead
text: Jefferies & Co. offered a list of the top 10 companies with low cash and high near-term debt maturities this week that it's advising investors to avoid.
